BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"0. I do not feel like a failure.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"0. I don't feel particularly guilty.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"0. I feel the same about myself as ever.","Q7":"0. I don't criticize or blame myself more than usual.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"0. I am no more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"0. I make decisions about as well as ever.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"1+. I sleep somewhat more than usual.","Q17":"0. I am no more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"0. I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex."}

10.response: {"Q0":"again, only if an astronaut would stay gone in future rounds"}

11.response: {"Q0":"loss of concentration or the impact of concentration on other choices"}

13.response: {"Q0":"the tutorial questionnaire was challenging, my mind had issues with it as i failed the exact same question 3 times in a row like an idiot"}

0.response: {"Q0":"The galaxy picking was irritating, i missed so many times i basically decided to press either one as a bad choice was better than no choice"}

7.response: {"Q0":"not at all, to me green was less than blue or red but better than nothing"}

9.response: {"Q0":"late in the game i gave up on the planets as red was costing me more than i was getting, before that digging was easy and 80% i'd get it done right and in time, galaxies were very tough and even concentrating on them the time was rough"}

1.response: {"Q0":"Again, the only thing i changed was the galaxy picking, i wasn't getting it in half the time so i decided to press either was a better choice than none, the planets themselves became 2nd nature after a few minutes"}

2.response: {"Q0":"at first it seemed 50/50, in the last round the red planet basically seemed empty, after 4 or 5 nothings in a row i just quit wasting gold to come up empty"}

8.response: {"Q0":"ideally odds and math, but the time was so slow that rarely impacted"}

4.response: {"Q0":"yes, only thing a bit unclear is would he remain gone in future rounds or the rest of the game, i assumed so but wasn't positive it was the correct choice until after the next round"}
